title: SG Recipes
description: Adds recipes for the stone cutter, crafting table and furnaces
body:
Adds the following recipes:
- Stonecutter:
- All types of wood have their items (slabs, stairs, doors, etc)
- Cobblestone to gravel
- Gravel to sand
- Furnace:
- Diorite smelts to calcite
- Basalt smelts to tuff
- Blast furnace:
- All raw ore blocks can be smelted to thier corresponding mineral block
- Crafting table:
- Cobblestone and sandstone to endstone
- Soulsand and bone block to soulsoil
- Stone to deepslate
